home.title: Every Click Counts. Every Achievement Matters.
home.subtitle: Learn, participate, and earn rewards through an engaging learning experience designed to keep students motivated and successful.

features.heading: Everything you need to succeed
features.body: Questify brings gamification to your institution's courses — keeping students engaged, motivated, and accountable every step of the way.

earnXp.title: Earn XP Points
earnXp.description: Every action you take earns you points. Attend classes, submit assignments on time, and read course materials to grow your XP score and unlock new milestones.

trackProgress.title: Track Progress
trackProgress.description: Real-time dashboards show your attendance rate, completed materials, and assignment scores — all in one place so you always know exactly where you stand.

joinLeaderboard.title: Join Leaderboard
joinLeaderboard.description: Every course has its own competitive leaderboard. Earn more XP than your peers, rise through the ranks, and claim your place at the top of the class.

aiLearning.title: AI-Powered Learning
aiLearning.description: Smart insights surface your strongest and weakest areas based on your activity. See where you're excelling and where to focus so you never fall behind.

howItWorks.heading: Learn. Earn Points. Climb the Leaderboard.
howItWorks.body: Every action you take earns you points — attend classes, submit assignments, and read course materials to rise through the rankings.

attendance.title: +10 pts — Attendance
attendance.description: Get marked present in a class to earn attendance points for that course.

assignment.title: +25 pts — Assignment
assignment.description: Submit your assignments on time and earn bonus points toward your course rank.

reading.title: +15 pts — Reading PDF
reading.description: Read course PDF materials on the platform to accumulate reading points.

ranking.title: Leaderboard Ranking
ranking.description: Each course has its own leaderboard. Compete with peers and top the rankings.

stats.heading: Powering our campus community
stats.body: Students and faculty across our institution use Questify to make academic progress measurable, rewarding, and transparent.
stats.errorMsg: Could not load live statistics — showing cached data.

coursesSection.heading: Explore Courses
coursesSection.body: Browse your institution's course catalogue and enroll to start earning XP and climbing the leaderboard.

footer.description: A gamified learning management system that makes education measurable, rewarding, and fun. Earn XP, climb leaderboards, and watch your skills grow.
footer.newsletterText: Product news, learning tips, and community spotlights — delivered straight to your inbox.
footer.noSpam: No spam, ever. Unsubscribe any time.
footer.subscribed: You're subscribed! Welcome to the Questify community.

studentDashboard.enrollCta: Enroll in a course to start earning XP
